description.ko: 대양의 심해, 고압의 어둠 속에서 투명한 생명체들이 펼치는 평화롭고 리드미컬한 춤.
description.en: A peaceful, rhythmic dance of transparent life forms in the high-pressure darkness of the oceanic abyss.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Abyssal Waltz.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise bioluminescent jellyfish with long, translucent #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsate in unison. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow. In the background, ancient #006994 mineral vents release thermal bubbles. Photorealistic fluid dynamics, high-pressure deep sea atmosphere, 8k resolution.
